caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering, and a gold watch sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a white background featuring the "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logo repeated vertically. To his right, a sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". He is speaking into a professional microphone and gesturing with his hands. In front of him on a dark table is a black equipment case and a black mug that says "THE TALK OUT LOUD PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and continues to talk, shifting his hand positions and facial expressions. His gaze moves from looking toward someone off-camera to the left, to looking more directly forward. The camera angle remains static, capturing his upper body as he engages in conversation.
